import { api } from "./api";
import { logger } from "./logger";
import type { Order, OrderPayload } from "./types";

const RETRY_LIMIT = 3;
const TIMEOUT_MS = 5000;
const BASE_URL = "https://example.com/api";

export type SubmitResult = {
  ok: boolean;
  order?: Order;
  error?: string;
};

export async function submitOrder(payload: OrderPayload): Promise<SubmitResult> {
  let attempt = 0;
  while (attempt < RETRY_LIMIT) {
    attempt += 1;
    try {
      const order = await api.submit(payload, { timeout: TIMEOUT_MS });
      logger.info("order submitted", { id: order.id, attempt });
      return { ok: true, order };
    } catch (error) {
      logger.warn("submit failed, retrying", { attempt });
      if (attempt >= RETRY_LIMIT) {
        return { ok: false, error: String(error) };
      }
    }
  }
  return { ok: false, error: "exhausted retries" };
}

export function validatePayload(payload: OrderPayload): string[] {
  const errors: string[] = [];
  if (!payload.id) {
    errors.push("missing id");
  }
  if (!payload.items || payload.items.length === 0) {
    errors.push("no items");
  }
  if (payload.total <= 0) {
    errors.push("total must be positive");
  }
  return errors;
}

export function summarizeOrder(order: Order): string {
  const lines = [
    `Order ${order.id}`,
    `Items: ${order.items.length}`,
    `Total: ${order.total}`,
  ];
  return lines.join("\n");
}

export async function cancelOrder(id: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const result = await api.cancel(id, { timeout: TIMEOUT_MS });
  logger.info("order cancelled", { id });
  return result.ok;
}
